title: We were part of this world ourselves.
intro: Every photographer has at least once searched for a model through friends. Every model has waited for an invitation that never came. We saw how fragmented this world is — and decided to change it.
declarationLead: Stop running from place to place.
closing: We created a space where all participants of the creative process exist under one roof. With a shared goal — to find each other and create something greater than alone.
